name: testWaitScopeGetAnalysedBitSegments
title: testWaitScopeGetAnalysedBitSegments
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetAnalysedBitSegments(long bitNumber, ScopeAnalyseBitSegmentData segmentData, dword noOfSegments);
description: Request the analysis data for a single bit. The analysis data are calculated by calling the function testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments.

parameters.name: bitNumber
parameters.description: The bit number the data are requested.The number must be between 0 and the return value of the function testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments.

parameters.name: SegmentStart
parameters.type: Start of segment within bit in %

parameters.name: SegmentEnd
parameters.type: End of segment within bit in %

parameters.name: BitField
parameters.type: Scope enum for bit type or field type. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

parameters.name: BitNo
parameters.type: Number of bit within bit field

parameters.name: BitLevel
parameters.type: 0 – dominant bit level 1 – recessive bit level

parameters.name: ReferenceVoltage
parameters.type: Voltage of reference point in mV

parameters.name: MinVoltage
parameters.type: Minimal voltage within the segment in mV

parameters.name: MaxVoltage
parameters.type: Maximal voltage within the segment in mV

parameters.name: AvgVoltage
parameters.type: Average voltage within the segment in mV

parameters.name: noOfSegments
parameters.description: Number of the bit segments. The Number should be the same used by the function testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments (maximum = 10).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
